text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... And there's the last lap. I believe we've finished everything we had planned for today.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's finally summer camp! Yaeno is in high spirits and powers through
our training schedule for the day in no time.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Now then, I'll get straight to goofing off!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Goofing off, as I was meant to accomplish at the amusement park. I give you my word—I will forget about training during my downtime!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Especially... since there's something I want to check...
choice_data_list: There is? Anything I can help with?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...No, I was just mumbling to myself! I'll let you know when I have a
better grasp of it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Amateur though I am, I will attempt a gleeful romp down the shore.
I'll give my full concentration to splashing in the waves!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I just finished a game with the tide! I tried to zigzag along the water's
edge without touching it, learning much about route-planning
for—oh. I inadvertently trained again...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I went and played beach volleyball! I learned to read my opponents'
body language and how they channel power into pinpoint spikes,
which is sure to be useful for... Ah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Yet again, I've failed to forget my training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This time... I went for a mindless run down the beach and back! Does
that... still count as training?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Tch, then I'll just keep trying! I'm going to the festival this evening! If
you can spare the time, I would appreciate the company, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The waves of people are fierce as a storm-swept sea. Finding a way
through this crowd will serve as good practice for breaking past the
pack... No!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Tch, even the festival cannot tear my mind from racing?
choice_data_list:
Oh boy... Hey, Yaeno! Check out the shooting
game!

Oh boy... Hey, Yaeno! Check out the shooting
game!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Good choice. Shooting targets shouldn't be relevant to racing...
Right? This may be just the activity I need for a breakthrough.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I thank you for your guidance, Trainer.
Pardon, Sir! I would like to purchase a ticket for the shooting game!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pop! Pop!

text_block_list.name: Festival Worker
text_block_list.text:
Too bad! You didn't hit anything this time, kiddo. Better luck next
time!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: To miss every shot... My lack of precision is humiliating.
choice_data_list:
Aw, c'mon, there's no shame in losing a silly
game. It's just for fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's allowed to make mistakes—that's how people grow. I'm trying to
encourage her to take things easier, both in and out of training.
choice_data_list:
I know better than anyone how hard you work,
Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. Somehow, I knew you'd say that. First at the theme park, and
again now.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. I think I've finally gathered my resolve. Trainer, would you
give me a little more of your time?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I mean, of course. I nod my head without thinking.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pardon, sir! I would like to purchase five more tickets for the game!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...Aaand she's gonna be at this until she shoots something.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Urgh, what amateur shooting! To make this many attempts and still
fail—it's almost laughable!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Thanks, I'm not throwing in the towel yet! I'm starting to get a feel for
it. I have to be slow with the aim, and line it up just right...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Trainer, how is my form? Everything look okay?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I appreciate the support! Now I just have to hold the gun gently. Easy
now... Have fun...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: And shoot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pop!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With a soft thump, the cat plush Yaeno's been aiming at is knocked
off its stand.

text_block_list.name: Festival Worker
text_block_list.text: Bull's-eye! The prize is all yours! Nice shootin' there, kiddo!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Oh... Thank you so much!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I really did it! I let completely loose and had fun playing the game!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way back, as we near the lodge, Yaeno stops me, saying she
wants to talk about something.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
At the festival, I felt like a little kid again. Playing with a toy gun,
trying to win a stuffed animal...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Yes, I did!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...And I finally understood why it took so long. Why I struggle to stop
training in times of rest.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was afraid of the blaze in my heart, ashamed of letting it show
outside races.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Deep down, I thought unrestrained, childlike play... was a shameful
mark of immaturity.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And so I practiced self-restraint and hid all my idle desires. I tried to
think only of training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But you taught me that it's okay to fool around and make mistakes.
And that's why... That's why I was able to let go and have fun today.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Because you showed me that I don't have to fear the blaze. And
that... it's nothing to be ashamed of.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Right. I understand now. I can forget about training when I'm with
you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: With that said, Trainer, I... I'd like to do some katas for you.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
...For some reason, I feel that today's revelations will give me new
strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nod, and just as she begins, a firework bursts in the sky behind her.
The summer festival must be drawing to a close.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Framed by sparks of light, Yaeno strikes and dodges with a new
energy—performing the capricious dance of a flame.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: What a wonder. What a joy this day has been!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
...It's perfect. After a time, Yaeno's blaze simmers down to a warm
crackle, and we close out the clear summer evening on a lighthearted
note.
